examples:
<sqf>
// outputs the following:
// Press W to move forward.
// Press S to move backwards.
hint "Press W to move forward.\nPress S to move backwards."
</sqf>

<sqf>
hint str count allPlayers;
sleep 10;
hintSilent ""; // hides the previous hint display
</sqf>
<sqf>hint parseText "<t size='2.0'>Large text</t>"; // displays text twice as large as the default one</sqf>

<sqf>_txt = text "Red text, right align";
_txt setAttributes ["color", "#FF0000", "align", "right"];
hint composeText [_txt];</sqf>
name: hint
problem_notes:
{{GVI|ofp|1.00}} {{GVI|arma1|1.00}} {{GVI|arma2|1.00}} Hint messages that exceed the screen may lead to crashes.
{{GVI|arma3|1.00}} The game would not crash but suffer FPS drop / temporary freezing.
